title: Cavern of Broken Dreams
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Location |image=[[File:2x18_cavern_of_broken_dreams.jpg]] |name=Cavern of Broken Dreams |created= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Endor/Legends|Endor]] |terrain= |fauna=An [[Unidentified Endor arachnid|arachnid]] |flora= |interest= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Wicket! Where are you going?''"
"''To the Cavern of Broken Dreams.|Princess Kneesaa and a sad Wicket|{{Ewoks|Just My Luck}}}} The '''Cavern of Broken Dreams''' was a point of interest on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. The young [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] warrior apprentice, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], went to the cavern out of depression for having failed his first warrior's test. His friend, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], attempted to force a mischievous [[Lucksprite/Legends|Lucksprite]] to tell Wicket the truth: that he was the one responsible for Wicket's failure. Wicket initially refused to believe Kneesaa, even after he saved her from a [[Unidentified Endor arachnid|giant spider]] and defeated the Lucksprite's bad luck. However, upon learning that he was the first warrior to ever defeat this particularly formidable Lucksprite, Wicket eagerly accepted Kneesaa's intercession for a new test, and left the cavern. ==Appearances== *{{Ewoks|Just My Luck}} {{Flash}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Caves]] [[Category:Endor locations]]
